_metadata.license: N/A — factual key format descriptions are not copyrightable

provenance.format_notes: Okta Developer Docs state tokens are 42 chars, start with '00', alphanumeric + hyphens. Used in 'Authorization: SSWS <token>' header. Okta dev forum thread confirms exact format.
provenance.fp_risk: LOW-MEDIUM — '00' is a weak prefix, but combined with exact 42-char length and requires_column_hint=true the FP surface is controlled

provenance.format_notes: Postman officially documents PMAK- prefix. Two hex segments separated by hyphen: 24 chars + 34 chars. Full example XOR-encoded in s3c_proposed_patterns.json.
provenance.fp_risk: VERY LOW — PMAK- is a uniquely distinctive prefix

provenance.format_notes: Airtable documentation states token ID is first 14 chars of PAT. Gitleaks issue and TruffleHog PR #3933/#3941 confirm format: 'pat' + 14 alphanum chars (token ID) + '.' + 32-64 alphanumeric (secret). Dot separator makes this highly distinctive.
provenance.fp_risk: VERY LOW — 'pat' + 14 chars + dot is a highly distinctive structure; 'pat' alone would collide with 'patch/patient/pattern' but the full regex including the dot separator is robust

provenance.format_notes: Heroku Dev Center changelog entry explicitly documents: 'OAuth access tokens are 65 characters long and prefixed with HRKU-'. Full example XOR-encoded in s3c_proposed_patterns.json. New format since April 23 2025.
provenance.fp_risk: VERY LOW — HRKU- is a uniquely distinctive prefix

provenance.format_notes: Render API authentication docs describe keys with 'rnd_' prefix. Consistent across Render blog posts and third-party integrations. Exact body length not officially documented; 32-64 is a conservative lower bound derived from observed examples.
provenance.fp_risk: LOW — 'rnd_' is distinctive but shorter prefix than ideal; body length constraint reduces FP risk
